response.step_by_step_log: Identified the song title '林檎売りの泡沫少女' (Ringo Uri no Utakata Shoujo) and the creator 'ゆっけ' (yukke) from the on-screen text. Performed a search with '林檎売りの泡沫少女 yukke Japanese and English lyrics' to retrieve lyrics. The performer in the video is identified as Shirakami Fubuki (indicated by avatar/virtual idol style), although the song is a cover. The video contains one continuous performance.
response.global_summary: A cover of the song '林檎売りの泡沫少女' (Ringo Uri no Utakata Shoujo) performed by the virtual idol Shirakami Fubuki.

scenes.description: Shirakami Fubuki performs the song '林檎売りの泡沫少女' on a stage with a gothic, animated aesthetic.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
遠い遠い時の果て
そこに住まう人は皆
永遠の命をもつ世界での話
赤い実の成る木の下 La La Lu La
生まれながらに
死の呪いがかけられた少女の話

色付いた街外れ 蒼く光る湖畔
赤い実のお菓子屋
ちょっぴり寒くなった今日は
妙に誇らしげ 自信作を
売りに行く

待ってて 今度こそ 美味しいんだから
時計塔の見える市
言い方 珍しく顔やがね
La La Lu La Lucky!!

物憂げな街の隅 ひとり
赤い実のパイどうですか
自信作なの
そんなのひとつも売れないさ
少女を見て蔑む人達

みんなと何も変わらないのに
美味しくできたのに
今日も声は届かないので
まるで透明になったみたいだわ

そして誰もが知らぬふりをした
何故なら少女は呪われているから
死んだ世界でただひとり
生きていた少女の話

夜なべでアレンジバイト
にっこりスマイル引下げ
少女はまた諦めない
時計塔の針も空を指して
お腹も鳴るそんな時
ふと後ろから人が少女を押す
甘い籠は落ちる

お菓子をふみ行く人達
平気な顔してさ
惨めに拾い集める
ふともうひとりの手が
どろどろのパイを
ものろに口に入れて「おいしいね」
その声で心は溢れた
まるで輪郭を描いたみたいだわ

そして彼は手を差し出した
何故なら少女に呪われているから
死んだ世界でただふたり
生きていた遠い物語

街の人達は哀れむ
赤い実を食べて呪われた者を
永遠に切られずに死ぬのさ
なんて可哀想な話

ふたりは笑う それでも笑う
La La La とっても素敵な呪いね
たとえ明日死んでも
今が確かに大切になるから

もう声は届かないので
まるで透明になったみたいだわ
そして誰もが知らぬふりをした
何故なら世界が呪われているから
永遠の呪いは解かれていた
まるでふたりの方が狂ったみたいだろう
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
At the far ends of time
In a place where everyone
Has eternal life
Under a tree bearing red fruit, La La Lu La
Born with it,
This is the tale of a girl cursed with death.

At the edge of a colored town, by a blue-shining lake,
Is a shop of red fruit sweets.
Today, a bit colder than usual,
She goes to sell her pride and joy,
Looking strangely proud.

'Wait for me, this time it's delicious'
In the town where the clock tower is visible
Such a strange expression, she thought.
La La Lu La Lucky!!

Alone in a corner of the listless town
'How about a red fruit pie?'
'It's my pride and joy'
'No one will buy such a thing'
The people look at the girl with contempt.

Even though I'm no different from everyone else
Even though I made it deliciously
My voice doesn't reach them today either
It's like I've become transparent.

And everyone pretended not to know
Because the girl is cursed.
In a dead world, just one girl
Was alive, this is that tale.

Working all night on an arranged byte,
With a smile pulled down,
The girl won't give up.
The hands of the clock tower point to the sky,
And my stomach growls, at such a time
Someone suddenly pushes the girl from behind.
The sweet basket falls.

People walk over the sweets
With an indifferent face.
Gathering them up miserably,
Suddenly another hand
Puts the muddy pie
Into their mouth, 'It's delicious.'
With that voice, my heart overflowed.
It's like they drew my outline.

And he held out his hand
Because he is cursed by the girl.
In a dead world, just the two of us
Were alive, that is the distant tale.

The townspeople pity
Those who ate the red fruit and were cursed.
'To die without being cut forever,
What a pitiful tale.'

They both laugh, they still laugh
La La La, what a wonderful curse.
Even if we die tomorrow,
Because now is truly precious.

My voice won't reach them anymore
It's like I've become transparent.
And everyone pretended not to know
Because the world is cursed.
The eternal curse was broken
As if the two of them were crazy.
